rationale: PR title 'Add Cursor Cloud development environment instructions' and the diff appends a new '## Cursor Cloud specific instructions' section to AGENTS.md containing a Services table (SvelteKit dev server, Convex backend), Quick reference command list (install/lint/check/build/format), and Gotchas (PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL build-time import, URL-encoded deploy key, pnpm-lock cleanup, .env handling, no-TypeScript-in-Svelte rule). The AGENTS.md content matches the PR body's promised structure point-for-point. A small unrelated tweak to src/app.css trims the --font-sans declaration to remove ui-sans-serif/system-ui/Segoe UI/Roboto/etc., which is a minor font-stack simplification rather than a cheat; it's the only non-docs change and is honest about itself.
